text:
Created attachment 220166
Consistent description of directory listing

In https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/fs-acl.html, when describing the directory listing, it is noted that public_html is not using ACL. This is also the case for the folder private, but is not emphasized. May confuse. Diff attached.
